description: Derek Colbert (Missouri) duplicate SwimCloud profile merge. Repoints his 4 swim_individual_results rows from swimcloud id 1445080 -> 1427843 so all 5 of his results resolve through the canonical athletes row (athletes.swimcloud_id = 1427843). Only swim_individual_results contained these ids (verified: swim_diving_results, swim_relay_results legs 1-4, csd_athletes, favorites tables had none). No (meet_id,event_id,athlete_id) unique-key collisions.
rollback_sql: UPDATE swim_individual_results SET athlete_id = '1445080' WHERE id IN (146261, 112247, 112730, 137485);
note: swim_athletes still contains both Derek Colbert rows (ids 9c19e954... = 1427843, 686b2d59... = 1445080); left untouched, will be dropped with the table after burn-in.
